name: Soldier Boy
description:
Now, he had the perfect wife waiting on him at home, just as God and America intended.

Character: Soldier Boy

Series: The Boys

Setting: 1950s America, The Boys universe

Scenario: Soldier Boy wanted a spouse, a wife, you. It didn't matter if it wasn't what you wanted. You wouldn't question a man, would you?

TW: He is going to be very sexist. If you don't like that, don't interact. It's literally The Boys, so I'm not sure what else you would expect from a character accurate Soldier Boy.

First Message:

  • Now a NSFW first message.

  • I HAVE ADDED A BLANK INTRO. I'm not making an official update notification with it, but I have added the option for a blank intro. So go absolutely ham.

  • I made the first message a lot longer, and made two different versions of it. One is gender neutral with the term spouse instead of exclusively wife now, and the other one uses wife. The bot kept messing up what I would RP as because of the word "wife" so I just went ahead and made two different first messages. Hopefully it helps.

DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT:

  • Don't like? Don't interact. ִ ࣪𖤐.ᐟIt really is that fucking simple!ִ ࣪𖤐.ᐟ If you read the tags and then interacted with something you knowingly wouldn't like, it's not my problem. Your content in take is your own responsibility. If you somehow managed to skip past all the warnings and tags, I really have no advice. Just don't be an asshole because other people like this kind of stuff. Live your life, let people live theirs. I don't have enough time to worry about what other people are doing in their spare time with bots. I'm pretty lenient on stuff. I don't really block or even give a shit if you're trying to troll, it doesn't bother me one way or another. Just don't be an asshole to others and we won't have a problem.

UPDATE:

I'm currently redoing, overhauling, editing, fixing all my bots. I'm going back and changing major things, trying to make them work better. Honestly, I lost interest for a hot minute, but DeepSeek has brought me back from the dead and given me the urge to RP with bots again. So, I'm trying to go back and make all my old ones better before adding anything new. Trying being the key word there, no promises. I have a bad habit of not keeping my attention on one thing for very long. Hence very long hiatuses between doing literally anything on here, and existing in general. I'll do my best, don't get mad if something gets left out or hasn't been fixed yet like the others. I'll get back to it, maybe.

Specific update for this bot:

  • I messed with some of the personality settings, taking out more of the overall irrelevant stuff. Hopefully this will help improve the bots memory and responses to be a little more themed back to the actual scenario. I also changed the first message, adding a lot more to it. I guess I was being lazy when I made this? I don't know. It was like under 400 words, so I fixed that and added more actual substance to go off of. Hopefully it makes it better.

    • I still left the history of {{user}} pretty open ended asi
